plugins.author: Josh.5 / marcosviniciusi
plugins.description: Ignore files under the configured video resolution.
plugins.name: Ignore - Video Under Resolution Limit

plugins.author: Josh.5 / marcosviniciusi
plugins.description: Only look for files ending in a specified extension.
plugins.name: Limit library search by file extension

plugins.author: Josh.5 / marcosviniciusi
plugins.description: Ignore files over the configured video resolution.
plugins.name: Ignore - Video Over Resolution Limit

plugins.author: Josh.5 / marcosviniciusi
plugins.description: Convert DTS, FLAC, Opus and Vorbis audio streams to EAC3 5.1 (Dolby Digital Plus). Sources above 6 channels are downmixed to 5.1.
plugins.name: Audio Transcoder - EAC3 5.1 (Dolby Digital Plus)

plugins.author: marcosviniciusi
plugins.description: Keeps only PT-BR subtitles embedded in the MKV, removes everything else
plugins.name: Subtitles Transcode - Keep PT-BR Only

plugins.author: marcosviniciusi
plugins.description: Writes UNMANIC_FULL_PIPELINE_V2=processed metadata tag to mark the file as fully processed. Place as the LAST processing step in your pipeline. Works with vm_ignore_metadata_unmanic to prevent reprocessing.
plugins.name: Tag Pipeline Complete - Write Full Pipeline Tag

plugins.author: Josh.5 / marcosviniciusi
plugins.description: Ignore files if they exist in the completed tasks list (with status success OR failed)
plugins.name: Ignore - Task History

plugins.author: marcosviniciusi
plugins.description: Remove duplicate audio streams from media files. Streams are considered duplicates when all specs match: codec, channels, language, title, and bitrate. Keeps only the first occurrence of each unique audio stream.
plugins.name: Audio Remove Duplicates - Deduplicate Audio Streams

plugins.author: marcosviniciusi
plugins.description: Ignore files that have already completed the full processing pipeline. Checks for UNMANIC_FULL_PIPELINE_V2=processed metadata tag. Runs LAST (priority 0) to override all other plugins — if tag exists, file is completely ignored.
plugins.name: Ignore - Full Pipeline Completed

plugins.author: Josh.5
plugins.description: Ignore files recently modified on disk.
plugins.name: Ignore files recently modified

plugins.author: marcosviniciusi
plugins.description: Send completed task logs to an OpenTelemetry-compatible backend (SigNoz, Jaeger, Grafana Tempo) via OTLP HTTP. Logs task status (success/failed), full file path, and duration.
plugins.name: Post-Processor - OpenTelemetry Task Log

plugins.author: Josh.5, EspadaV8 / marcosviniciusi
plugins.description: Aggregate changes in file size metrics for processed files and add a data panel for displaying the results.
plugins.name: File Size Metrics Data Panel

plugins.author: marcosviniciusi
plugins.description: Converts PGS/VOBSUB (bitmap) subtitles to SRT via OCR and ASS/SSA (styled text) to SRT via FFmpeg. All subtitles become plain SRT embedded in the MKV.
plugins.name: Subtitle Transcode - OCR PGS/ASS to SRT

plugins.author: Josh.5 / marcosviniciusi
plugins.description: Ignore files recently modified on disk.
plugins.name: Ignore files recently modified

plugins.author: Josh.5 / marcosviniciusi
plugins.description: Transcode the video streams of a video file with HW acceleration and metadata support
plugins.name: Video Transcoder - HW Accelerated with Metadata

plugins.author: Josh.5 / marcosviniciusi
plugins.description: Create a stereo clone of all surround audio streams (>2ch). Prevents reprocessing via format-level metadata tag, channel/language analysis, and codec detection. Stereo titles reflect real output specs (language, codec, stereo).
plugins.name: Audio Transcode Create Stereo - Surround Sound Downmix
